cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out when Thomas could have gone to the football field. Let me start by listing out all the information given. First, Thomas woke up at 8am. Then there are several people who saw Thomas doing different things at different times: - David saw him fixing a computer from 8am to 10am. - Jennifer saw him buying lunch from 10am to 12pm. - Lisa saw him walking towards the Statue of Liberty from 12pm to 2pm. - Sarah saw him buying a phone from 2pm to 5pm. - Kimberly saw him buying a bike from 6pm to 9pm. The football field was closed after 9pm. The question is asking between what times Thomas could have gone to the football field. The options are (A) 12pm to 2pm, (B) 8am to 10am, (C) 2pm to 5pm, (D) 5pm to 6pm. Alright, let's break this down. Thomas's activities are accounted for during specific time slots. So, if he was doing something else during a time, he couldn't have been at the football field then. But if there's a time when he wasn't doing anything reported, then that's a possible window. Let me create a timeline of his known activities: - 8am to 10am: fixing computer (David) - 10am to 12pm: buying lunch (Jennifer) - 12pm to 2pm: walking towards Statue of Liberty (Lisa) - 2pm to 5pm: buying phone (Sarah) - 6pm to 9pm: buying bike (Kimberly) Also, he woke up at 8am, so before that he was asleep. The football field is closed after 9pm, so he couldn't have gone after that. Now let's see the gaps between these activities. From 8am onward, his activities start. Let's check the times between each activity: - Before 8am: Asleep, so not possible. - 8am to 10am: Busy with computer. - 10am to 12pm: Buying lunch. - 12pm to 2pm: Walking towards Statue of Liberty. - 2pm to 5pm: Buying phone. - 5pm to 6pm: No reported activity. - 6pm to 9pm: Buying bike. - After 9pm: Football field closed. So the only time gap when Thomas has no reported activity is between 5pm and 6pm. During that hour, there's no mention of him doing anything. So that would be the only possible time window when he could have gone to the football field, assuming he wasn't doing something else unreported.
